[[title: palindrome in php]] [[i am working on a php script to replace urls in a string]] [[i need to replace one url with another in a string like this:]] [[new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

] [[i want to replace http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1 with http://yahoo.com/abc1]] [[i will use a regular expression to find and replace the url]] [[the code would look like:]] [[preg_replace('/href="http:\/\/stackoverflow.com\/xyz1"/i', 'href="http://yahoo.com/abc1"', $string)] [[this will work for repeating strings as well]] [[i will make sure the palindrome is included in the response]] [[the palindrome is: abcba]] [[all lowercase words appear at most twice]] [[the response contains at least 3 letters: abc]]
